audit_items.proof_trace: SSZ unmarshaling enforces element sizes via generated code constraints. The type conversions kzg.Cell(slice) and kzg.Bytes48(slice) will panic if sizes mismatch, but this is defensive: SSZ tags ssz-size:"?,2048" and ssz-size:"?,48" are enforced during UnmarshalSSZ, rejecting invalid messages before type conversion.
